  • Method Details

    • train

      <T> SequenceClassificationModel train(SequenceStream<T> events) throws IOException
      Trains a SequenceClassificationModel for given events.
      Type Parameters:
      T - The generic type of elements to process via the SequenceStream.
      Parameters:
      events - The input events.
      Returns:
      The trained SequenceClassificationModel.
      Throws:
      IOException - Thrown if IO errors occurred.
